race.comment: GLENBOWER (1) has found the line okay but been safely held in his two runs this prep, both over shorter journeys. Looks in need of 1400m now and despite a hefty 61.5kgs is ready to win. FAST BLUE (11) has rediscovered his best form of late with a couple of close-up efforts, the latest a barnstorming second over this distance at Taree. Drawn to enjoy a cosy run and will be hard to stop once presented. THE CRISTAL (4) is a lightly raced mare back from a six-month spell. Beaten under a length when fresh from a break last prep over 1500m at Hawkesbury. Two recent trials will have her up to the mark. MADAME FIOCCA (7) was too bad to be true at Canberra last start. The stable press on so assume all is well. Best form measures up so worth another chance. YACHT GIRL (10) caught the eye at the conclusion of 1200m at the Beaumont track recently. Backs up eight days later over an extra furlong which looks ideal.
